content:
Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare is a first-person shooter that revolutionized the genre with its cinematic storytelling and addictive multiplayer. Set in a modern conflict, the game delivers heart-pounding action and unforgettable moments.

Step into the boots of elite soldiers across the globe in a gripping campaign filled with twists and intense firefights. The multiplayer mode set new standards with its progression system, customizable loadouts, and addictive gameplay that keeps players coming back for more.

## Key Features

### Intense Single-Player Campaign
Experience a cinematic story with memorable missions like "All Ghillied Up" and "Death From Above," blending stealth, action, and emotional storytelling.

### Revolutionary Multiplayer
Call of Duty 4 introduced killstreaks, perks, and a progression system that became the blueprint for future FPS games, offering endless replayability.

### Realistic Modern Warfare
Fight with authentic weapons and tactics in diverse locations, from Middle Eastern cities to Russian countryside, all rendered with stunning detail.

### Customizable Loadouts
Tailor your soldier with unique weapon combinations, attachments, and perks to suit your playstyle in multiplayer matches.

### Iconic Maps
Battle across fan-favorite maps like Crash, Shipment, and Crossfire, each designed for strategic gameplay and intense firefights.

## Gameplay Overview

Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare delivers fast-paced, precision-based combat with tight controls and responsive mechanics. The campaign alternates between explosive set-pieces and quieter, tactical moments, while multiplayer rewards skill and strategy. Players can choose from a variety of game modes, including Team Deathmatch, Search and Destroy, and Domination, each offering unique challenges. The game’s fluid movement, realistic weapon handling, and balanced gameplay make it a timeless classic in the FPS genre.

frontmatter.title: Call of Duty 4 Modern Warfare
frontmatter.description: Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare redefined the FPS genre with its intense campaign and groundbreaking multiplayer. Experience iconic missions, fast-paced combat, and a gripping story set in modern warfare.

minimum.processor: Intel Pentium 4 2.4 GHz or AMD Athlon 64 2800+
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 6600 GT or ATI Radeon 9800 Pro

recommended.processor: Intel Core 2 Duo or AMD Athlon 64 X2 4200+
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 7800 GT or ATI Radeon X1800 XL

content:
Call of Duty Modern Warfare 3 is the explosive finale to the original Modern Warfare trilogy, offering heart-pounding action across global battlefields. With its cinematic campaign, robust multiplayer, and cooperative Spec Ops mode, it’s a must-play for FPS fans.

Set in a world on the brink of collapse, Modern Warfare 3 continues the story of Task Force 141 as they battle against a global terrorist threat. Players will engage in high-stakes missions across iconic locations, from New York City to London, with unparalleled intensity and realism.

## Key Features

### Cinematic Campaign
Experience a gripping narrative with high-production values, featuring intense set-pieces and memorable characters. The campaign delivers a rollercoaster of emotions and action-packed moments.

### Thrilling Multiplayer
Engage in fast-paced, competitive multiplayer with a variety of modes, maps, and customization options. The refined combat system and progression keep players coming back for more.

### Spec Ops Mode
Team up with a friend in cooperative missions that test your skills and strategy. Spec Ops offers a unique challenge separate from the campaign and multiplayer.

### Cutting-Edge Graphics
Enjoy stunning visuals and realistic environments that immerse you in the chaos of modern warfare. The game’s engine delivers smooth performance and breathtaking detail.

## Gameplay Overview

Modern Warfare 3 builds on the series’ signature fast-paced combat, with tight controls and responsive mechanics. The campaign offers a mix of stealth, all-out assault, and vehicular combat, while multiplayer focuses on skill and strategy. Whether you’re playing solo or with friends, the game delivers an adrenaline-fueled experience that defines the Call of Duty franchise.

frontmatter.title: Call of Duty Modern Warfare 3
frontmatter.description: Call of Duty Modern Warfare 3 delivers intense first-person shooter action with a gripping campaign, thrilling multiplayer, and cooperative Spec Ops mode. Experience global warfare with cutting-edge graphics and explosive gameplay.

minimum.processor: Intel Core 2 Duo E6600 or AMD Phenom X3 8750
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 8600GT or ATI Radeon X1950 Pro

recommended.processor: Intel Core i5-2500K or AMD Ryzen 5 1600X
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 or AMD Radeon RX 580

content:
Call of Duty: Black Ops delivers a heart-pounding FPS experience with a deep narrative and explosive multiplayer action. Set during the Cold War, it combines historical intrigue with blockbuster gameplay.

Step into the shadows of covert operations in Call of Duty: Black Ops, where conspiracy and betrayal shape the fate of nations. Play as elite operatives in a globe-trotting campaign, or team up in the fan-favorite Zombies mode for endless undead-slaying fun. With its cinematic storytelling and adrenaline-fueled combat, Black Ops redefines the shooter genre.

## Key Features

### Gripping Campaign
Embark on a globe-trotting mission through the Cold War era, uncovering dark secrets and engaging in high-stakes covert operations. The narrative-driven campaign keeps players on the edge of their seats.

### Iconic Zombies Mode
Team up with friends to survive waves of the undead in this beloved cooperative mode. Unlock new areas, discover Easter eggs, and test your survival skills against increasingly difficult hordes.

### Competitive Multiplayer
Dominate in fast-paced, tactical multiplayer battles with a wide array of weapons, perks, and killstreaks. Customize your loadout and climb the ranks in various game modes.

### Cutting-Edge Weaponry
Wield an arsenal of authentic Cold War-era firearms and experimental tech. Each weapon feels distinct, offering players strategic choices for different combat scenarios.

### Memorable Characters
Meet a cast of unforgettable operatives, including the legendary Alex Mason and Frank Woods. Their personal stories add depth to the high-octane action.

## Gameplay Overview

Call of Duty: Black Ops combines tight gunplay with strategic movement, creating a fluid and immersive combat experience. The campaign alternates between intense firefights and stealthy infiltration, while multiplayer rewards both quick reflexes and tactical thinking. Zombies mode offers a unique blend of teamwork and resource management, making it a standout feature. Whether you're a solo player or a competitive online warrior, Black Ops delivers endless replayability.

frontmatter.title: Call of Duty Black Ops
frontmatter.description: Call of Duty: Black Ops is a gripping first-person shooter set during the Cold War. Experience intense combat, a thrilling campaign, and iconic Zombies mode in this classic entry in the Call of Duty franchise.

minimum.processor: Intel Core 2 Duo E6600 or AMD Phenom X3 8750
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 8600GT or ATI Radeon X1950 Pro

recommended.processor: Intel Core i5 or AMD Phenom II X4
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 460 or ATI Radeon HD 5850

content:
Call of Duty Black Ops II delivers a gripping mix of futuristic warfare and Cold War intrigue, blending explosive action with deep narrative choices.

Set in 2025, *Call of Duty Black Ops II* pits players against a rogue military faction led by the charismatic villain Raul Menendez. The game’s campaign features branching storylines where your decisions shape the outcome, while the multiplayer introduces futuristic weapons and scorestreaks. The fan-favorite Zombies mode returns with new maps and cooperative survival gameplay.

## Key Features

### Branching Campaign
Your choices matter in the campaign, with multiple endings based on decisions made during key missions and Strike Force operations.

### Futuristic Multiplayer
Engage in fast-paced combat with customizable loadouts, scorestreaks, and the new Pick 10 system for unparalleled flexibility.

### Zombies Mode
Team up in cooperative Zombies survival with unique maps like TranZit and Grief, offering endless hours of undead-slaying fun.

### Strike Force Missions
These optional RTS-style missions impact the main campaign, adding strategic depth to the traditional FPS experience.

### Theater Mode
Record and share your best multiplayer and Zombies moments with the built-in Theater Mode, complete with editing tools.

## Gameplay Overview

*Call of Duty Black Ops II* refines the series’ signature fast-paced combat with new mechanics like the Pick 10 system, allowing players to tailor their loadouts for maximum efficiency. The campaign’s non-linear structure encourages replayability, while multiplayer offers a wealth of modes, from Team Deathmatch to Hardpoint. Zombies mode expands with new enemies, buildable items, and Easter eggs, keeping players engaged long after the credits roll.

frontmatter.title: Call of Duty Black Ops II
frontmatter.description: Call of Duty Black Ops II is a thrilling first-person shooter set in a near-future Cold War era. Experience intense combat, branching storylines, and iconic Zombies mode in this action-packed blockbuster.
frontmatter.game_name: Call of Duty Black Ops II

minimum.processor: Intel Core2 Duo E8200 2.66 GHz or AMD Phenom X3 8750 2.4 GHz
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 8800GT 512 MB or ATI Radeon HD 3870 512 MB

recommended.processor: Intel Core i5 or AMD Phenom II X4
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 560 or ATI Radeon HD 6950

content:
Call of Duty: Ghosts delivers heart-pounding action with its signature fast-paced gameplay and cinematic storytelling. Set in a devastated future, players take on the role of an elite soldier fighting against a global superpower.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Campaign Mode
Embark on a gripping single-player campaign with a rich narrative, set in a world reshaped by a catastrophic event. The story follows a group of elite soldiers known as Ghosts.

### Expanded Multiplayer
Experience refined multiplayer with new modes, maps, and customization options. The game introduces dynamic maps with interactive elements that change during matches.

### Extinction Mode
A cooperative survival mode where players battle against alien creatures in intense, wave-based combat. Teamwork and strategy are key to surviving the onslaught.

### Character Customization
Create and personalize your soldier with a wide range of weapons, perks, and cosmetic options. The loadout system allows for deep tactical flexibility.

### Next-Gen Graphics
Leveraging advanced technology, Ghosts offers stunning visuals, realistic animations, and immersive sound design for a next-level gaming experience.

## Gameplay Overview

Call of Duty: Ghosts retains the series' signature fast-paced combat while introducing new mechanics like sliding, leaning, and contextual interactions. The multiplayer mode features a revamped perk system and squad-based gameplay, allowing players to create and level up their own squad of AI teammates. The campaign offers a mix of stealth, vehicular combat, and large-scale battles, ensuring variety throughout the experience. Whether you're a solo player or a competitive multiplayer enthusiast, Ghosts delivers an action-packed adventure.

frontmatter.title: Call of Duty: Ghosts
frontmatter.description: Call of Duty: Ghosts is a thrilling first-person shooter set in a post-apocalyptic world. Experience intense combat, a gripping campaign, and addictive multiplayer modes in this iconic franchise entry.

minimum.processor: Intel Core 2 Duo E8200 2.66 GHz or AMD Phenom X3 8750 2.4 GHz
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTS 450 or ATI Radeon HD 5870

recommended.processor: Intel Core i5 – 680 @ 3.6GHz
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 or AMD Radeon HD 7970

content:
Call of Duty Black Ops III delivers a high-octane FPS experience with a futuristic twist. Set in 2065, the game combines advanced warfare, cybernetic enhancements, and a dark narrative to create an unforgettable shooter.

## Key Features

### Futuristic Campaign
Embark on a gripping single-player or co-op campaign set in a dystopian future, where cybernetic soldiers and rogue AI threaten global stability. The story is dark, immersive, and full of twists.

### Multiplayer Mayhem
Engage in fast-paced multiplayer battles with customizable loadouts, specialist abilities, and fluid movement mechanics like wall-running and thrust jumps. Compete in various modes for ultimate bragging rights.

### Zombies Mode
Survive waves of the undead in the fan-favorite Zombies mode, featuring a unique storyline, easter eggs, and cooperative gameplay. This mode is a staple of the Black Ops series.

### Weapon Crafting
Customize your arsenal with the Gunsmith system, allowing deep weapon modifications and camo unlocks. Tailor your guns to fit your playstyle perfectly.

### Cybernetic Abilities
Enhance your soldier with cyber-core abilities, offering unique combat perks and tactical advantages. These abilities add a layer of strategy to both campaign and multiplayer.

## Gameplay Overview

Call of Duty Black Ops III offers a blend of traditional FPS action and futuristic mechanics. The movement system allows for fluid traversal, while the gunplay remains tight and responsive. Whether you're playing solo or with friends, the game provides a variety of experiences, from the story-driven campaign to the competitive multiplayer and cooperative Zombies mode. The game's depth comes from its customization options, ensuring no two players have the same loadout or strategy.

frontmatter.title: Call of Duty Black Ops III
frontmatter.description: Call of Duty Black Ops III is a thrilling first-person shooter set in a dystopian future, featuring intense combat, a gripping campaign, and iconic Zombies mode. Experience fast-paced action and deep multiplayer customization.
frontmatter.game_name: Call of Duty Black Ops III

minimum.processor: Intel Core i3-530 @ 2.93 GHz / AMD Phenom II X4 810 @ 2.60 GHz
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 470 @ 1GB / ATI Radeon HD 6970 @ 1GB

recommended.processor: Intel Core i5-2500K @ 3.30GHz
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 / AMD Radeon R9 390

content:
Call of Duty WWII takes players back to the iconic battles of World War II, delivering a visceral and cinematic experience. This installment marks a return to the series' origins with a focus on historical authenticity and brutal warfare.

Step into the boots of a young soldier in the 1st Infantry Division, fighting across Europe in a gripping single-player campaign. Call of Duty WWII captures the camaraderie and sacrifice of war, with intense battles, emotional storytelling, and iconic locations like Normandy and the Battle of the Bulge. The game also features a robust multiplayer mode and a cooperative Zombies experience with a terrifying new twist.

## Key Features

### Authentic World War II Setting
Immerse yourself in meticulously recreated battles and locations, from the D-Day landings to the liberation of Paris. The game captures the grit and scale of WWII with stunning detail.

### Intense Campaign Mode
Follow the story of Private Ronald "Red" Daniels and his squad as they fight through pivotal moments of the war. The campaign emphasizes brotherhood, sacrifice, and the horrors of combat.

### Thrilling Multiplayer
Engage in fast-paced, team-based battles across a variety of maps and modes. The new Divisions system replaces traditional create-a-class, offering a more immersive progression experience.

### Nazi Zombies
Team up with friends in a chilling cooperative mode that pits you against hordes of undead Nazi experiments. This standalone story introduces new characters and terrifying enemies.

### War Mode
Experience objective-based battles that unfold across multi-stage missions. This mode emphasizes teamwork and strategy, offering a fresh take on multiplayer combat.

## Gameplay Overview

Call of Duty WWII combines the series' signature fast-paced action with a renewed focus on realism. The campaign features tight squad mechanics, where allies provide ammo, health, and support. Multiplayer introduces the Headquarters social space, where players can interact, customize their loadouts, and compete in challenges. The game's mechanics are designed to feel weighty and impactful, with a emphasis on tactical movement and precise aiming. Whether you're storming the beaches of Normandy or battling in multiplayer, Call of Duty WWII delivers an adrenaline-fueled experience.

frontmatter.title: Call of Duty WWII
frontmatter.description: Call of Duty WWII is a gripping first-person shooter set in World War II. Experience intense combat, a compelling campaign, and thrilling multiplayer modes in this authentic return to the series' roots.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i3 3225 or equivalent
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 or AMD Radeon HD 7850

recommended.processor: Intel Core i5 2400 or equivalent
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 or AMD Radeon R9 390

content:
Shadow of the Tomb Raider delivers a gripping finale to Lara Croft's transformation into the iconic Tomb Raider. Set in treacherous jungles and hidden ruins, this action-adventure game combines intense combat, exploration, and puzzle-solving.

In Shadow of the Tomb Raider, Lara must race against time to stop a Mayan apocalypse she inadvertently triggered. The game takes players through stunning environments, from dense rainforests to underwater caves, as Lara hones her survival skills and uncovers dark secrets. With a mix of stealth, combat, and traversal mechanics, this installment pushes Lara to her limits.

## Key Features

### Deadly Jungle Environments
Navigate through the most hostile environments yet, where every step could be your last. Dynamic weather and wildlife add to the immersion.

### Enhanced Puzzle Tombs
Discover challenging tombs filled with intricate puzzles that reward exploration and clever thinking.

### Brutal Combat and Stealth
Choose your approach—stalk enemies from the shadows or engage in visceral combat with new mechanics like mud camouflage.

### Deep Character Progression
Upgrade Lara’s skills, weapons, and gear to tailor her abilities to your playstyle.

### Emotional Storyline
Experience Lara’s most personal journey yet, as she faces the consequences of her actions and embraces her destiny.

## Gameplay Overview

Shadow of the Tomb Raider blends exploration, puzzle-solving, and combat seamlessly. Players will traverse vast environments using Lara’s climbing and swimming skills, while solving environmental puzzles to progress. The game introduces new mechanics like rappelling and underwater exploration, adding depth to the gameplay. Combat is more tactical, with stealth playing a larger role, and enemies reacting dynamically to Lara’s actions. The narrative-driven experience keeps players engaged with cinematic storytelling and meaningful character development.

frontmatter.title: Shadow of the Tomb Raider
frontmatter.description: Shadow of the Tomb Raider is the thrilling conclusion to Lara Croft's origin story. Explore deadly jungles, solve ancient puzzles, and outwit enemies in this action-adventure masterpiece.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i3-3220 or AMD equivalent
minimum.graphics: Nvidia GTX 660/GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon HD 7770

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-4770K or AMD Ryzen 5 1600
recommended.graphics: Nvidia GTX 1060 6GB or AMD Radeon RX 480 8GB

content:
Rise of the Tomb Raider continues Lara Croft's transformation into a hardened adventurer. Set in treacherous landscapes, the game blends exploration, combat, and puzzle-solving in a gripping narrative.

Lara's quest to uncover the secret of immortality takes her to Siberia, where she faces deadly enemies and harsh conditions. With improved mechanics and a deeper story, this installment elevates the Tomb Raider experience.

## Key Features

### Stunning Environments
Explore breathtaking locations, from icy mountains to dense forests, each filled with secrets and challenges.

### Refined Combat
Engage in tactical combat with a variety of weapons and stealth options to outsmart enemies.

### Survival Mechanics
Scavenge resources, craft gear, and endure harsh conditions to stay alive in the wild.

### Puzzle Solving
Solve intricate puzzles tied to ancient tombs and hidden relics, rewarding exploration.

### Character Progression
Upgrade Lara's skills and equipment to adapt to the evolving challenges of her journey.

## Gameplay Overview

Rise of the Tomb Raider combines action, exploration, and survival in a seamless experience. Players will navigate dangerous terrain, engage in dynamic combat, and uncover hidden secrets. The game's open-ended levels encourage creativity, whether you prefer stealth, brute force, or a mix of both. With a compelling story and immersive gameplay, it's a must-play for adventure fans.

frontmatter.title: Rise of the Tomb Raider
frontmatter.description: Rise of the Tomb Raider is an action-adventure game where Lara Croft embarks on a perilous journey to uncover ancient secrets. Experience thrilling combat, exploration, and survival in stunning environments.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i3-2100 or AMD equivalent
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 650 2GB or AMD HD7770 2GB

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-3770K or AMD FX-8350
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 970 4GB or AMD R9 290X 4GB

content:
Tomb Raider reboots the iconic franchise with a gritty origin story for Lara Croft, transforming her from a young archaeologist into a hardened survivor. Stranded on a mysterious island, players must navigate treacherous landscapes, uncover hidden tombs, and outwit dangerous foes.

## Key Features

### Survival Instincts
Lara's survival instincts highlight interactive elements, helping players spot clues, track enemies, and find hidden paths in the environment.

### Dynamic Combat
Engage in fluid third-person combat with a mix of bow stealth, gunplay, and melee takedowns, adapting to ever-changing threats.

### Exploration & Puzzles
Discover hidden tombs filled with intricate puzzles that reward clever thinking and thorough exploration.

### Stunning Environments
Traverse dense forests, icy mountains, and claustrophobic caves, all rendered with breathtaking detail and realism.

### Character Progression
Upgrade Lara's skills and gear, unlocking new abilities that enhance traversal, combat, and survival tactics.

## Gameplay Overview

Tomb Raider blends cinematic storytelling with immersive gameplay. Players guide Lara through a semi-open world, balancing combat, exploration, and puzzle-solving. The game emphasizes resourcefulness—scavenging materials to craft tools, scaling cliffs with climbing axes, and using fire to illuminate dark passages. Quick-time events and physics-based challenges keep action sequences intense, while optional tombs provide deeper challenges for completionists. With its gripping narrative and refined mechanics, Tomb Raider delivers a fresh yet faithful take on the iconic adventurer's journey.

frontmatter.title: Tomb Raider
frontmatter.description: Tomb Raider follows Lara Croft's intense origin story as she becomes the legendary explorer. Survive deadly environments, solve ancient puzzles, and battle ruthless enemies in this action-adventure masterpiece.

minimum.processor: Dual core 2.0 GHz
minimum.graphics: DirectX 9.0c compatible, 512 MB VRAM

recommended.processor: Quad core 2.5 GHz
recommended.graphics: DirectX 11 compatible, 1 GB VRAM

content:
Tomb Raider: Underworld continues the legendary adventures of Lara Croft, blending action, exploration, and puzzle-solving in a thrilling package. This installment takes players to exotic locations, from the jungles of Mexico to the frozen ruins of the Arctic, as Lara seeks the mythical Norse underworld.

In Tomb Raider: Underworld, Lara Croft is on a quest to uncover the secrets of her mother's disappearance, leading her to ancient artifacts and deadly adversaries. The game builds on the series' signature gameplay with enhanced mechanics, including a more dynamic environment and improved combat system. Players will navigate treacherous tombs, solve intricate puzzles, and engage in intense firefights.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Environments
Tomb Raider: Underworld features highly interactive environments where players can manipulate objects, climb surfaces, and trigger traps. The game's physics engine allows for realistic interactions, making exploration feel immersive.

### Enhanced Combat System
Lara's combat abilities have been refined, offering a mix of melee attacks, acrobatics, and gunplay. Players can use the environment to their advantage, dodging attacks and taking cover strategically.

### Puzzle-Solving Challenges
The game is filled with complex puzzles that require keen observation and logical thinking. From ancient mechanisms to cryptic symbols, each puzzle is designed to test players' problem-solving skills.

### Stunning Visuals
With detailed character models and breathtaking landscapes, Tomb Raider: Underworld delivers a visually impressive experience. The lighting and weather effects add to the atmosphere, making each location feel alive.

### Engaging Storyline
The narrative delves deeper into Lara's personal journey, revealing more about her past and motivations. The story is filled with twists and turns, keeping players invested from start to finish.

## Gameplay Overview

Tomb Raider: Underworld combines exploration, combat, and puzzle-solving in a seamless experience. Players control Lara as she traverses diverse environments, using her agility and wit to overcome obstacles. The game encourages experimentation, with multiple paths and solutions to challenges. Whether you're scaling ancient ruins or battling enemies, the gameplay remains fluid and engaging. Fans of the series will appreciate the refined mechanics, while newcomers will find plenty to enjoy in this action-packed adventure.

frontmatter.title: Tomb Raider: Underworld
frontmatter.description: Tomb Raider: Underworld is an action-adventure game where Lara Croft embarks on a globe-trotting journey to uncover ancient mysteries. With fluid combat, intricate puzzles, and stunning environments, it's a must-play for fans of the genre.

minimum.processor: 3.0 GHz Intel Pentium IV or equivalent
minimum.graphics: 128 MB DirectX 9.0c-compliant card (NVIDIA GeForce 6 series or ATI Radeon 1300XT)

recommended.processor: Intel Core 2 Duo 2.2 GHz or equivalent
recommended.graphics: 256 MB DirectX 9.0c-compliant card (NVIDIA GeForce 8800 or ATI Radeon HD 2900XT)

content:
Battlefield 4 is a first-person shooter that immerses players in large-scale modern warfare battles. With its stunning graphics, destructible environments, and intense multiplayer action, it delivers an unparalleled combat experience.

Set in a near-future world on the brink of chaos, Battlefield 4 pits nations against each other in all-out war. Players take on the role of elite soldiers, engaging in ground, air, and sea battles across dynamic maps that evolve as the fight progresses. The game's narrative-driven campaign and expansive multiplayer modes offer endless replayability.

## Key Features

### Massive 64-Player Battles
Engage in epic large-scale warfare with up to 64 players, featuring combined arms combat across land, air, and sea.

### Destructible Environments
Watch the battlefield change in real-time as buildings collapse, bridges explode, and terrain is reshaped by the chaos of war.

### Advanced Weapon Customization
Tailor your arsenal with a vast array of weapons, attachments, and gadgets to suit your playstyle.

### Dynamic Levolution
Experience game-changing events like skyscrapers collapsing or floods altering the map, adding strategic depth to every match.

### Squad-Based Teamplay
Work with your squad to dominate the battlefield, using teamwork and coordination to outmaneuver the enemy.

## Gameplay Overview

Battlefield 4 combines fast-paced infantry combat with vehicular warfare, offering a balanced mix of strategy and action. Players can choose from multiple classes, each with unique abilities and equipment, to contribute to their team's success. The game's Frostbite 3 engine delivers stunning visuals and realistic physics, making every explosion and bullet impact feel impactful.

Multiplayer modes like Conquest, Rush, and Team Deathmatch provide varied gameplay experiences, while the single-player campaign offers a cinematic story of global conflict. Whether you're piloting a jet, commanding a tank, or fighting on foot, Battlefield 4 keeps the adrenaline pumping with its relentless action and immersive atmosphere.

frontmatter.title: Battlefield 4
frontmatter.description: Battlefield 4 is a thrilling first-person shooter set in modern warfare, featuring large-scale battles, destructible environments, and intense multiplayer action. Experience epic 64-player battles, dynamic maps, and cutting-edge graphics.

minimum.processor: AMD Athlon X2 2.8 GHz / Intel Core 2 Duo 2.4 GHz
minimum.graphics: AMD Radeon HD 3870 / NVIDIA GeForce 8800 GT

recommended.processor: AMD Six-Core CPU / Intel Quad-Core CPU
recommended.graphics: AMD Radeon HD 7870 / NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660

content:
Battlefield 1 immerses players in the chaos of World War I, offering a visceral and historically inspired combat experience. With its stunning visuals, massive battles, and dynamic environments, it stands out as a unique entry in the FPS genre.

Set in the early 20th century, Battlefield 1 takes you across iconic WWI battlefields, from the muddy trenches of France to the deserts of Arabia. The game combines intense multiplayer action with a deeply emotional single-player War Stories campaign, showcasing the untold stories of the Great War.

## Key Features

### Massive 64-Player Battles
Engage in all-out warfare with up to 64 players in sprawling multiplayer maps. Teamwork and strategy are key to dominating the battlefield.

### Dynamic Weather and Destruction
Experience ever-changing conditions like rain, fog, and sandstorms, while destructible environments add a layer of realism and tactical depth.

### Authentic WWI Arsenal
Wield historically accurate weapons, vehicles, and gadgets, from bolt-action rifles to armored tanks and biplanes.

### War Stories Campaign
Play through emotionally charged single-player stories that highlight lesser-known aspects of WWI, each with unique characters and settings.

### Behemoth Vehicles
Take control of massive war machines like the armored train or airship to turn the tide of battle in your favor.

## Gameplay Overview

Battlefield 1 delivers fast-paced, large-scale combat with a focus on teamwork and objective-based gameplay. The multiplayer modes, including Conquest and Operations, pit teams against each other in epic battles across land, air, and sea. The game's signature destruction mechanics allow players to reshape the battlefield, creating new paths or collapsing structures on enemies.

In single-player, the War Stories campaign offers a series of vignettes that explore the human side of war. Each story provides a different perspective, from a rookie tank driver to a Bedouin warrior, adding depth and variety to the experience. Whether you prefer solo play or competitive multiplayer, Battlefield 1 offers something for every FPS fan.

frontmatter.title: Battlefield 1
frontmatter.description: Battlefield 1 is a first-person shooter set in World War I, featuring large-scale battles, authentic weapons, and dynamic destruction. Experience intense multiplayer warfare and a gripping single-player campaign across diverse global battlefields.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-6600K or AMD FX-6350
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 or AMD Radeon HD 7850

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-4790 or AMD FX-8350
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 or AMD Radeon RX 480

content:
Battlefield V plunges players into the chaos of World War II with its signature large-scale battles, realistic graphics, and dynamic gameplay. Whether you're fighting in the single-player War Stories or engaging in massive multiplayer modes, the game delivers an authentic and visceral war experience.

Set across iconic locations from World War II, Battlefield V combines historical authenticity with the franchise's trademark sandbox gameplay. Players can engage in grand operations, where battles span multiple maps and days, or dive into the cooperative Combined Arms mode. The game's attention to detail, from weapon customization to environmental destruction, makes every match feel unique and unpredictable.

## Key Features

### Grand Operations
Experience multi-day battles that evolve based on your team's performance, with dynamic weather and shifting objectives that keep the gameplay fresh and challenging.

### War Stories
Immerse yourself in single-player campaigns that highlight lesser-known tales of World War II, offering emotional and cinematic storytelling.

### Firestorm
Battlefield V's battle royale mode pits 64 players against each other in a shrinking map, combining the franchise's destruction mechanics with intense survival gameplay.

### Combined Arms
Team up with friends in cooperative missions that require strategy and teamwork to overcome AI-controlled enemies and complete objectives.

### Customization
Personalize your soldier, weapons, and vehicles with a wide range of cosmetic and functional upgrades to suit your playstyle.

## Gameplay Overview

Battlefield V emphasizes teamwork and strategy, with large-scale battles featuring up to 64 players. The game introduces new mechanics like fortifications, allowing players to build defenses, and a revamped movement system for more fluid combat. The dynamic environments react to explosions and gunfire, creating ever-changing battlefields.

Whether you're piloting a plane, driving a tank, or fighting on foot, Battlefield V offers a variety of ways to engage in combat. The game's attrition system encourages teamwork by limiting ammo and health, making supply points and medics crucial to survival. With its blend of historical authenticity and innovative gameplay, Battlefield V stands out as a must-play for FPS fans.

frontmatter.title: Battlefield V
frontmatter.description: Battlefield V is a gripping first-person shooter set in World War II, offering intense multiplayer battles, a compelling single-player campaign, and immersive warfare mechanics. Experience large-scale combat with stunning visuals and dynamic destruction.

minimum.processor: AMD FX-8350 or Intel Core i5 6600K
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 / NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 or AMD Radeon RX 560 / HD 7850

recommended.processor: AMD Ryzen 3 1300X or Intel Core i7 4790
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 6GB or AMD Radeon RX 580 8GB

content:
Battlefield 6 redefines modern military shooters with its unparalleled scale and realism. Prepare for the most immersive battlefield experience yet.

Set in a near-future world on the brink of global conflict, Battlefield 6 thrusts players into heart-pounding, large-scale warfare. With advanced technology and unprecedented player counts, every match feels like a cinematic warzone. Whether you're piloting helicopters, commanding tanks, or engaging in close-quarters combat, the chaos of battle is yours to master.

## Key Features

### 128-Player Battles
Engage in the largest battles in FPS history, with 128 players fighting across sprawling maps designed for strategic warfare.

### Dynamic Destruction
Watch the battlefield evolve in real-time as buildings crumble, terrain shifts, and no cover is ever truly safe.

### Next-Gen Graphics
Experience stunning visuals powered by the latest engine, bringing lifelike details, weather effects, and immersive audio to every firefight.

### Advanced Vehicle Combat
Pilot jets, helicopters, tanks, and more with refined controls and physics that make vehicular warfare more realistic than ever.

### Customizable Loadouts
Tailor your soldier with a deep progression system, unlocking weapons, gadgets, and perks to suit your playstyle.

## Gameplay Overview

Battlefield 6 focuses on teamwork and adaptability, offering a mix of infantry and vehicle combat across diverse environments. The game introduces new mechanics like tactical sprint, enhanced squad play, and dynamic events that keep matches unpredictable. Whether you're capturing objectives in Conquest or surviving the intense chaos of Breakthrough, every match tells a unique story of victory or defeat. With cross-play support, you can join the fight with friends on any platform and experience the future of warfare together.

frontmatter.title: Battlefield 6
frontmatter.description: Battlefield 6 delivers next-gen warfare with massive 128-player battles, dynamic destruction, and cutting-edge graphics. Experience the ultimate FPS with realistic combat, vehicles, and ever-changing battlefields.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-6600K / AMD Ryzen 5 1600
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 Ti / AMD Radeon RX 570

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-9700K / AMD Ryzen 7 3700X
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 / AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT

content:
Fallout 3 Game of the Year Edition immerses players in a radioactive wasteland where every decision matters. This definitive edition includes the base game and all five major DLC expansions, offering hundreds of hours of gameplay.

Set in the ruins of Washington D.C., Fallout 3 delivers a gripping narrative where you emerge from Vault 101 to find your father and uncover the secrets of the Capital Wasteland. The game blends first-person shooter combat with deep RPG mechanics, allowing you to customize your character, make moral choices, and interact with a richly detailed world full of factions, mutants, and hidden treasures.

## Key Features

### Vast Open Wasteland
Explore a meticulously crafted post-apocalyptic world filled with ruins, underground metros, and dangerous creatures. Every location tells a story, from abandoned settlements to super mutant strongholds.

### Deep Character Customization
Shape your survivor with the S.P.E.C.I.A.L. system, choosing stats, perks, and skills that define your playstyle—be a smooth-talking diplomat, a stealthy assassin, or a brute-force warrior.

### Moral Choices & Consequences
Your decisions impact the world, from small interactions to major faction alliances. Will you help rebuild society or exploit the weak for personal gain?

### Expanded DLC Content
Includes all five DLC packs: Operation Anchorage, The Pitt, Broken Steel, Point Lookout, and Mothership Zeta—each adding new quests, weapons, and areas to explore.

## Gameplay Overview

Fallout 3 combines first-person shooting with VATS (Vault-Tec Assisted Targeting System), allowing for tactical, slow-motion combat. Scavenge for weapons, armor, and supplies while managing radiation, hunger, and enemy threats. The game’s open-ended design encourages exploration, with side quests, random encounters, and hidden lore enriching the experience. Whether you prefer diplomacy, stealth, or all-out combat, Fallout 3 adapts to your choices, creating a uniquely personal journey through the wasteland.

frontmatter.title: Fallout 3 Game of the Year Edition
frontmatter.description: Fallout 3 Game of the Year Edition is an award-winning post-apocalyptic RPG set in a devastated Washington D.C. Explore, survive, and shape the wasteland with deep customization, moral choices, and all DLC included.
frontmatter.game_name: Fallout 3 Game of the Year Edition

minimum.processor: Intel Pentium 4 2.4 GHz or equivalent
minimum.graphics: DirectX 9.0c compatible GPU with 256MB RAM

recommended.processor: Intel Core 2 Duo or equivalent
recommended.graphics: DirectX 9.0c compatible GPU with 512MB RAM

content:
Step into the irradiated boots of the Courier in Fallout New Vegas, a critically acclaimed RPG that blends deep storytelling with open-world freedom. Set in the Mojave Desert after a nuclear war, this game offers a rich narrative and endless possibilities.

Fallout New Vegas expands upon the beloved Fallout formula with a gripping story of revenge, power, and survival. As the Courier, you’ll navigate a world torn apart by warring factions, make morally complex decisions, and carve your path through a landscape filled with danger and opportunity. The game’s reactive world ensures every choice has consequences, making each playthrough unique.

## Key Features

### Vast Open World
Explore the Mojave Wasteland, a sprawling desert filled with hidden secrets, dangerous creatures, and vibrant settlements. Every location tells a story, from the neon lights of New Vegas to the ruins of old-world civilization.

### Deep Role-Playing
Customize your character with a wide range of skills, perks, and traits. Your choices in dialogue, combat, and alliances shape the world around you, leading to multiple endings and replayability.

### Faction Warfare
Align with powerful factions like the NCR, Caesar’s Legion, or Mr. House, each with its own agenda. Your decisions determine who controls the Mojave and how the story unfolds.

### Hardcore Mode
For a true survival experience, enable Hardcore Mode, where you’ll need to manage hunger, thirst, and sleep alongside combat and exploration. It’s a brutal but rewarding challenge.

### Dynamic Combat
Engage in real-time or turn-based combat using the V.A.T.S. system. Choose from a vast arsenal of weapons, modify them with upgrades, and adapt your tactics to survive.

## Gameplay Overview

Fallout New Vegas combines first-person shooter mechanics with deep RPG elements. You’ll scavenge for resources, complete quests with multiple solutions, and interact with a cast of memorable characters. The game’s reputation system tracks your actions, influencing how NPCs react to you. Whether you prefer diplomacy, stealth, or all-out combat, the Mojave offers endless ways to play. The blend of exploration, storytelling, and player agency makes Fallout New Vegas a standout in the RPG genre.

frontmatter.title: Fallout New Vegas
frontmatter.description: Fallout New Vegas is a post-apocalyptic RPG set in the Mojave Wasteland. Survive in a brutal open world, shape your destiny with deep choices, and engage in intense combat. A must-play for fans of immersive storytelling.

minimum.processor: Dual Core 2.0 GHz
minimum.graphics: DirectX 9.0c compliant video card with 256 MB RAM

recommended.processor: Quad Core 2.5 GHz
recommended.graphics: DirectX 9.0c compliant video card with 512 MB RAM

content:
Step into the irradiated wasteland of Fallout 4, where every decision shapes your survival in a world forever changed by nuclear war.

Fallout 4 thrusts players into the ruins of Boston, known as the Commonwealth, 200 years after a global nuclear war. As the sole survivor of Vault 111, you emerge into a harsh world teeming with mutated creatures, ruthless raiders, and factions vying for control. With the power to shape your destiny, you’ll explore, build, and fight your way through a richly detailed open world filled with secrets and stories.

## Key Features

### Vast Open World
Explore the irradiated ruins of Boston, from the crumbling city streets to the eerie Glowing Sea, each location packed with lore, loot, and danger.

### Deep Character Customization
Create your ideal survivor with the most flexible character system in the series, including the all-new S.P.E.C.I.A.L. attributes and extensive crafting options.

### Settlement Building
Construct and manage thriving settlements, recruiting survivors, and defending your creations against threats in this innovative gameplay addition.

### Dynamic Combat System
Engage in intense first-person or third-person combat, utilizing an array of weapons, VATS targeting, and tactical options to overcome foes.

### Branching Storylines
Navigate morally complex choices that influence the world around you, with multiple factions offering unique quests and endings.

## Gameplay Overview

Fallout 4 blends traditional RPG mechanics with immersive shooter gameplay, offering unparalleled freedom. Scavenge for resources, craft weapons and armor, and interact with a living world where every NPC has a story. The game’s signature VATS system allows for strategic, slow-motion combat, while the settlement system adds a layer of creativity and management. Whether you’re uncovering the mysteries of the Institute or forging alliances with the Brotherhood of Steel, your journey is uniquely yours.

Survival mode ramps up the challenge, requiring careful planning for hunger, thirst, and fatigue, making every decision critical in the unforgiving wasteland.

frontmatter.title: Fallout 4
frontmatter.description: Fallout 4 is an immersive open-world RPG set in a post-apocalyptic Boston. Customize your character, build settlements, and survive in a world filled with danger, choices, and the iconic Vault-Tec aesthetic.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-2300 or AMD Phenom II X4 945
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 550 Ti or AMD Radeon HD 7870

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7 4790 or AMD FX-9590
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 780 or AMD Radeon R9 290X

content:
Just Cause 3 delivers chaos-fueled freedom in a breathtaking open world. Strap in for a high-octane adventure where creativity is your greatest weapon.

Set in the sun-drenched Mediterranean archipelago of Medici, Just Cause 3 puts you in the boots of Rico Rodriguez, a fearless rebel on a mission to overthrow the tyrannical dictator General Di Ravello. With its massive open world, physics-defying grappling hook, and endless opportunities for destruction, the game encourages players to unleash their inner anarchist. Whether you're soaring through the skies with your wingsuit or orchestrating elaborate explosions, Medici is your playground for chaos.

## Key Features

### Vast Open World
Explore the stunning island of Medici, spanning 400 square miles of diverse landscapes, from lush forests to bustling military bases and serene coastal towns.

### Grappling Hook & Wingsuit
Master Rico's iconic tools—the versatile grappling hook for creative traversal and the wingsuit for high-speed aerial maneuvers that redefine open-world movement.

### Explosive Sandbox Gameplay
Cause chaos with a vast arsenal of weapons and vehicles, triggering spectacular chain reactions as you dismantle Di Ravello's regime one explosion at a time.

### Liberation System
Free regions by creatively destroying military assets, with each liberated area unlocking new missions, challenges, and opportunities for mayhem.

### Dynamic Physics Engine
Experience realistic destruction as structures crumble, vehicles collide, and explosions ripple through the environment with breathtaking fidelity.

## Gameplay Overview

Just Cause 3 thrives on player freedom, offering a sandbox where creativity is rewarded. The core loop revolves around liberating territories by causing as much destruction as possible, using Rico's grappling hook to tether objects, hijack vehicles mid-air, or create absurd physics-based stunts. The wingsuit adds a thrilling layer of verticality, allowing seamless transitions between ground and air combat. With a focus on emergent gameplay, no two playthroughs are alike as players invent their own chaotic solutions to challenges. From base-jumping off skyscrapers to toppling statues with well-placed explosives, every moment in Medici feels like an action movie sequence.

frontmatter.title: Just Cause 3
frontmatter.description: Just Cause 3 is an explosive open-world action-adventure game where you play as Rico Rodriguez, liberating the Mediterranean island of Medici from a ruthless dictator with over-the-top chaos and creativity.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-2500K @ 3.3GHz or AMD Phenom II X6 1075T @ 3.0GHz
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 670 (2GB) or AMD Radeon HD 7870 (2GB)

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-3770 @ 3.4GHz or AMD FX-8350 @ 4.0GHz
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 780 (3GB) or AMD R9 290 (4GB)

content:
Just Cause 4 delivers over-the-top action in a breathtaking open world. As Rico Rodriguez, you’ll topple a tyrannical regime with creativity and chaos.

Set in the fictional South American country of Solís, Just Cause 4 pits you against the Black Hand, a high-tech private army. The game introduces extreme weather events like tornadoes and lightning storms, adding dynamic challenges to your missions. With a grappling hook, wingsuit, and an arsenal of customizable weapons, you’ll create spectacular moments of destruction.

## Key Features

### Extreme Weather Systems
Experience dynamic weather like never before, with tornadoes, sandstorms, and blizzards altering the battlefield in real-time.

### Expanded Grappling Hook
Rico’s iconic tool now has customizable mods, allowing you to tether objects, create kinetic chaos, or even deploy boosters for insane stunts.

### Vast Open World
Explore Solís, a diverse landscape spanning jungles, deserts, and snowy mountains, each with unique challenges and opportunities for mayhem.

### Advanced Vehicle Physics
Pilot helicopters, jets, and ground vehicles with refined controls, or hijack enemy tech to turn their weapons against them.

### Frontline Missions
Lead a rebellion against the Black Hand, completing strategic objectives to weaken their grip on the region.

## Gameplay Overview

Just Cause 4 thrives on player freedom. The game’s physics engine encourages creative problem-solving—whether you’re using a grappling hook to attach a cow to a helicopter or riding a tornado into an enemy base. Missions range from high-octane assaults to stealthy sabotage, but the sandbox always rewards bold, chaotic approaches. With a seamless day-night cycle and reactive AI, every playthrough feels unique. The game’s progression system lets you unlock new gear and abilities, ensuring the action stays fresh as you liberate Solís.

frontmatter.title: Just Cause 4
frontmatter.description: Just Cause 4 is an explosive open-world action game where chaos is your greatest weapon. Take on a ruthless private militia in the diverse landscapes of Solís, using advanced physics and customizable gear to unleash destruction.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-2400 @ 3.1 GHz or AMD FX-6300 @ 3.5 GHz
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 (2GB VRAM) or AMD R9 270 (2GB VRAM)

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-4770 @ 3.4 GHz or AMD Ryzen 5 1600 @ 3.2 GHz
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 (6GB VRAM) or AMD Vega 56 (8GB VRAM)

content:
Just Cause 2 drops players into the shoes of Rico Rodriguez, a fearless operative tasked with overthrowing a ruthless dictator on the fictional island of Panau. This open-world sandbox game is all about causing chaos with unparalleled freedom and over-the-top action.

Set in a stunning tropical archipelago, Just Cause 2 offers a vast playground for destruction. Rico's mission is to destabilize the regime by any means necessary, whether it's blowing up military bases, hijacking vehicles, or liberating towns. The game's physics-driven chaos and emergent gameplay make every moment unpredictable and thrilling.

## Key Features

### Grappling Hook & Parachute
Rico's signature tools allow for insane mobility—grapple onto vehicles, buildings, or enemies, then parachute to safety or perform mid-air stunts. The combination creates endless possibilities for creative mayhem.

### Massive Open World
Explore Panau, a 400-square-mile island with diverse biomes, from dense jungles to snowy mountains. Every corner is packed with activities, hidden collectibles, and opportunities for destruction.

### Chaos System
Cause havoc to earn "Chaos" points, which unlock new missions and upgrades. The more destruction you create, the faster you progress through the game's rebel uprising storyline.

### Vehicle Mayhem
Pilot helicopters, jets, speedboats, and more—or attach them to each other with your grappling hook for ridiculous physics experiments. The vehicle handling is arcade-style and designed for fun over realism.

### Over-the-Top Action
From base jumping off skyscrapers to tethering enemies to exploding barrels, Just Cause 2 encourages players to think outside the box and embrace the absurd.

## Gameplay Overview

Just Cause 2 is a sandbox first and foremost, giving players the tools to create their own fun. The core loop involves completing missions to weaken the regime, liberating settlements, and causing enough chaos to unlock new regions. The game's physics engine ensures that no two moments play out the same way.

Combat is fast-paced and explosive, with a wide arsenal of weapons and gadgets. Whether you're engaging in firefights, car chases, or aerial dogfights, the action stays intense. The sheer scale of the world and the freedom to approach objectives however you like make Just Cause 2 a standout in the open-world genre.

frontmatter.title: Just Cause 2
frontmatter.description: Just Cause 2 is an explosive open-world action-adventure game where you play as Rico Rodriguez, a rogue agent causing chaos across the tropical island of Panau. With a grappling hook, parachute, and endless weapons, unleash destruction in a massive sandbox playground.

minimum.processor: Dual-core CPU (Intel Pentium D or AMD Athlon 64 X2)
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 8800 / ATI Radeon HD 2600 Pro (256 MB VRAM)

recommended.processor: Intel Core 2 Duo / AMD Phenom X3 or better
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTS 250 / ATI Radeon HD 5750 (512 MB VRAM)

content:
Step into the polished shoes of Agent 47 in *Hitman Contracts*, a dark and atmospheric entry in the iconic stealth franchise. This remastered collection enhances the original missions with improved visuals and gameplay refinements.

As the genetically engineered assassin, you'll navigate a morally gray world of high-profile contracts across Europe. *Hitman Contracts* refines the series' signature sandbox gameplay, offering multiple paths to eliminate targets with brutal efficiency or ghost-like precision. The game's noir-inspired narrative unfolds through flashbacks, revealing 47's mysterious past.

## What Makes Hitman Contracts Special

### Atmospheric World Design
Each mission location drips with moody ambiance, from rain-soaked streets to opulent mansions, encouraging immersive exploration and emergent gameplay.

### Creative Assassination Methods
Experiment with environmental kills, poisonings, accidents, and disguises—every contract offers dozens of ways to complete your objectives.

### Improved Stealth Mechanics
Refined enemy AI and detection systems create tense cat-and-mouse gameplay where every decision has consequences.

### Expanded Weapon Arsenal
Silenced pistols, fiber wire, sniper rifles, and improvised weapons provide diverse tools for different playstyles.

### Dynamic Soundtrack
Jesper Kyd's haunting score adapts to your actions, heightening tension during stealth sequences and combat.

## Core Gameplay Experience

*Hitman Contracts* rewards patience and creativity as you study target routines, infiltrate secure locations, and execute perfect kills. The game's open-ended levels function as intricate puzzle boxes—whether you prefer silent professionalism or chaotic improvisation. Mission grading encourages replayability, while the distinctive blend of stealth and action creates unforgettable emergent moments. With its refined mechanics and atmospheric presentation, *Hitman Contracts* remains a standout in the assassination genre.

frontmatter.title: Hitman Contracts
frontmatter.description: Hitman Contracts thrusts players into the shadowy world of Agent 47, blending stealth and action in a gripping assassination sandbox. Master disguises, creative kills, and immersive contracts across global locations.

minimum.processor: 1.4 GHz Intel Pentium 4 or equivalent
minimum.graphics: 64 MB DirectX 9.0c compatible

recommended.processor: 2.0 GHz Intel Pentium 4 or equivalent
recommended.graphics: 128 MB DirectX 9.0c compatible

content:
Step into the shoes of the world's deadliest assassin in *Hitman: Blood Money*, a game that redefines stealth-action with its open-ended gameplay and dark narrative.

As Agent 47, you’ll travel across the globe to eliminate high-profile targets with precision and creativity. Each mission is a sandbox of possibilities, allowing you to choose between silent takedowns or chaotic shootouts. The game’s innovative "Notoriety" system tracks your actions, affecting how the world reacts to your presence. With its gripping storyline and ruthless gameplay, *Hitman: Blood Money* remains a standout in the stealth genre.

## Key Features

### Multiple Assassination Methods
Plan your kills with endless possibilities—disguises, accidents, or outright confrontations. The choice is yours, and each method impacts the mission’s outcome.

### Dynamic Notoriety System
Your actions have consequences. The more attention you draw, the harder future missions become as enemies grow wary of your tactics.

### Expansive Sandbox Levels
Each mission takes place in intricately designed locations, from lavish parties to crowded streets, offering countless ways to approach your objectives.

### Weapon Customization
Upgrade and modify your arsenal to suit your playstyle, whether you prefer silenced pistols for stealth or heavy weaponry for brute force.

### Engaging Storyline
Unravel a conspiracy that threatens Agent 47’s very existence, filled with twists, betrayals, and cinematic moments.

## Gameplay Overview

*Hitman: Blood Money* thrives on player creativity. You’ll scout locations, gather intel, and exploit environmental opportunities to eliminate targets unnoticed. The game rewards patience and strategy, but also accommodates aggressive playstyles for those who prefer action. Disguises let you blend in, while distractions and accidents provide cover for your kills. The tension escalates as you balance stealth with the risk of exposure, making every decision critical. Whether you’re a silent predator or a ruthless executioner, *Hitman: Blood Money* delivers an unforgettable experience.

frontmatter.title: Hitman Blood Money
frontmatter.description: Hitman: Blood Money is a stealth-action masterpiece where you play as Agent 47, a professional assassin. Plan, execute, and disappear in this sandbox thriller with multiple ways to eliminate targets.

minimum.processor: 1.5 GHz Intel Pentium 4 or equivalent
minimum.graphics: 128 MB DirectX 9.0c-compatible GPU

recommended.processor: 2.4 GHz Intel Pentium 4 or equivalent
recommended.graphics: 256 MB DirectX 9.0c-compatible GPU

content:
Hitman: Absolution puts players in the shoes of Agent 47, a genetically enhanced assassin, as he navigates a world of betrayal and revenge. With a blend of stealth, action, and strategy, the game offers a unique experience for fans of the franchise and newcomers alike.

Set in a gritty, cinematic world, Hitman: Absolution follows Agent 47 after he disobeys orders to protect a young girl. Hunted by his former agency, he must uncover a conspiracy while staying one step ahead of his pursuers. The game combines tight gameplay with a compelling narrative, making it a standout in the stealth-action genre.

## Key Features

### Stealth and Disguises
Agent 47 can blend into environments using disguises, allowing players to infiltrate restricted areas unnoticed. Each disguise has its own risks and rewards, adding depth to the gameplay.

### Creative Assassinations
The game encourages players to experiment with different methods of eliminating targets, from silent takedowns to elaborate environmental kills.

### Instinct Mode
This unique feature lets players see enemy paths, predict movements, and even temporarily blend in, adding a strategic layer to stealth gameplay.

### Varied Environments
From crowded streets to heavily guarded facilities, each level offers multiple paths and opportunities for creative problem-solving.

### Engaging Storyline
Hitman: Absolution delivers a gripping narrative filled with twists, betrayals, and moral dilemmas, making it more than just a typical action game.

## Gameplay Overview

Hitman: Absolution focuses on stealth and strategy, rewarding players for careful planning and execution. Players can choose to go in guns blazing or take a more subtle approach, using disguises and environmental interactions to avoid detection. The game's levels are designed to offer multiple solutions to each objective, encouraging replayability. Whether you prefer silent assassinations or chaotic escapes, Hitman: Absolution provides the tools to play your way.

frontmatter.title: Hitman: Absolution
frontmatter.description: Hitman: Absolution is a stealth action game where players take on the role of Agent 47, a professional assassin navigating a world of betrayal and revenge. Experience intense stealth mechanics, creative assassinations, and a gripping narrative.

minimum.processor: Intel Core 2 Duo / AMD Phenom II X2
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 8800 GT / AMD Radeon HD 4650

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7 / AMD Phenom II X4
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 560 / AMD Radeon HD 6870

content:
Hitman is a critically acclaimed stealth action game that puts players in the shoes of Agent 47, a genetically enhanced assassin. The game offers a unique blend of strategy, creativity, and precision as you navigate complex sandbox environments to eliminate high-profile targets.

Set in a world of espionage and intrigue, Hitman challenges players to think like a professional killer. Each mission is a puzzle waiting to be solved, with countless ways to approach your objectives. Whether you prefer silent takedowns, elaborate accidents, or all-out chaos, the choice is yours.

## Key Features

### Sandbox Assassination
Hitman's levels are meticulously designed sandboxes, offering endless possibilities for creative kills. Every environment is packed with opportunities, disguises, and tools to help you execute the perfect assassination.

### Disguise System
Blend in with the crowd by donning disguises. From chefs to security guards, each outfit grants access to restricted areas, but be careful—certain NPCs can see through your ruse.

### Silent Takedowns
Master the art of stealth with silent takedowns. Use fiber wire, poison, or environmental hazards to eliminate targets without raising alarms.

### Mission Stories
Follow guided opportunities called Mission Stories, which provide step-by-step instructions for elaborate kills. These are perfect for newcomers or those who enjoy a more narrative-driven approach.

### Replayability
With multiple ways to complete each mission, Hitman encourages replayability. Experiment with different strategies, discover hidden paths, and achieve the highest ratings.

## Gameplay Overview

Hitman's gameplay revolves around planning, execution, and improvisation. Players start each mission with limited intel but can gather information by exploring the environment. The game rewards patience and observation, as every detail can be leveraged to your advantage.

Whether you're a perfectionist aiming for the Silent Assassin rating or a chaos-loving player who enjoys causing mayhem, Hitman caters to all playstyles. The game's blend of strategy, action, and dark humor makes it a standout in the stealth genre.

frontmatter.title: Hitman
frontmatter.description: Hitman is a stealth action game where players take on the role of Agent 47, a professional assassin. Navigate intricate sandbox levels, eliminate targets with creativity, and master the art of disguise in this immersive experience.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-2500K 3.3GHz / AMD Phenom II X4 940
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 / AMD Radeon HD 7870

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-4790 3.6GHz / AMD Ryzen 5 1600
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 / AMD Radeon RX Vega 56

content:
Step into the shoes of the world's deadliest assassin in *HITMAN 2*, a game that redefines stealth and creativity in the action-adventure genre. With its intricate sandbox levels and endless possibilities, this title offers a thrilling experience for both newcomers and series veterans.

Set in a world of intrigue and deception, *HITMAN 2* takes you across the globe to exotic locations, from sun-drenched beaches to bustling city streets. As Agent 47, you’ll uncover a sinister plot while executing meticulously planned assassinations. The game’s open-ended design encourages experimentation, allowing you to approach each mission in countless ways—whether you prefer silent takedowns or explosive chaos.

## Key Features

### Expansive Sandbox Levels
Each location in *HITMAN 2* is a meticulously crafted playground, filled with opportunities for creative kills and emergent gameplay. From crowded festivals to high-security compounds, every environment tells a story.

### Advanced Stealth Mechanics
Master the art of disguise, blend into crowds, and use the environment to your advantage. The game’s AI reacts dynamically to your actions, making every decision impactful.

### Signature Assassinations
Discover unique and often humorous ways to eliminate your targets. Whether it’s poisoning a drink or orchestrating a "freak accident," the possibilities are endless.

### Multiplayer Ghost Mode
Compete against another player in real-time to see who can eliminate targets faster and more efficiently. This mode adds a thrilling competitive edge to the stealth formula.

### Persistent Progression
Unlock new weapons, gadgets, and starting locations as you complete missions. Your choices and performance directly influence your arsenal and strategies.

## Gameplay Overview

*HITMAN 2* revolves around planning and executing perfect assassinations. Players can scout locations, gather intel, and choose their approach—whether it’s a silent infiltration or a guns-blazing rampage. The game’s replayability comes from its sandbox design, encouraging players to experiment with different methods and discover hidden opportunities.

The core mechanics emphasize patience and observation. You’ll need to study target routines, exploit environmental hazards, and adapt to unexpected complications. With its blend of tension and dark humor, *HITMAN 2* delivers a uniquely satisfying stealth experience.

frontmatter.title: HITMAN 2
frontmatter.description: HITMAN 2 is a stealth action-adventure game where you play as Agent 47, a master assassin. Explore exotic locations, execute creative kills, and unravel a global conspiracy in this immersive sandbox experience.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-2500K 3.3GHz / AMD Phenom II X4 940
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 / AMD Radeon HD 7870

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-4790 3.6GHz / AMD Ryzen 5 1600
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 / AMD Radeon RX Vega 56

content:
HITMAN 3 delivers the ultimate stealth experience, blending intricate level design with unparalleled player freedom. As Agent 47, you’ll execute perfectly planned assassinations across stunning global locations.

In HITMAN 3, players step into the shoes of the iconic bald assassin, Agent 47, to eliminate high-profile targets with precision and style. The game takes you to exotic locations like Dubai, Berlin, and Chongqing, each offering unique opportunities for creative kills. Whether you prefer silent takedowns or explosive chaos, the choice is yours.

## Key Features

### Elaborate Sandbox Levels
Each mission in HITMAN 3 is set in a meticulously crafted sandbox environment, packed with hidden pathways, disguises, and interactive elements to exploit.

### Creative Assassinations
From poisoning a target’s drink to orchestrating "accidental" deaths, the game rewards players for thinking outside the box.

### Stealth and Combat
Choose between silent, ghost-like approaches or going in guns blazing, with a robust combat system that adapts to your playstyle.

### Persistent Progression
Unlock new gear, starting locations, and tools as you complete missions, enhancing your strategic options for future playthroughs.

### Stunning Visuals
Experience breathtakingly detailed locations, from neon-lit streets to opulent skyscrapers, all rendered in stunning 4K.

## Gameplay Overview

HITMAN 3 focuses on player choice and experimentation. Each level is a puzzle waiting to be solved, with countless ways to approach your objectives. The game’s AI reacts dynamically to your actions, making every playthrough unique. Whether you’re a perfectionist aiming for the Silent Assassin rating or a chaos-loving trickster, HITMAN 3 offers endless replayability.

Master the art of assassination by blending in, using disguises, and manipulating the environment. The game’s intuitive controls and deep mechanics ensure both newcomers and veterans can enjoy the experience. With a compelling story tying the trilogy together, HITMAN 3 is a must-play for fans of stealth and strategy.

frontmatter.title: HITMAN 3
frontmatter.description: HITMAN 3 is the thrilling conclusion to the World of Assassination trilogy, offering players a globetrotting adventure as Agent 47. Master stealth, creativity, and precision in this award-winning action game.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-2500K / AMD Phenom II X4 940
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 / AMD Radeon HD 7870

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-4790 / AMD Ryzen 5 1600
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 / AMD Radeon RX Vega 56

content:
Step into the shoes of Agent 47, a cloned assassin with unparalleled skills, in *Hitman Codename 47*. This groundbreaking game redefined stealth gameplay with its open-ended missions and brutal efficiency.

Set in a dark, criminal underworld, *Hitman Codename 47* tasks you with eliminating high-profile targets across diverse locations. Whether you prefer silent takedowns or chaotic shootouts, the choice is yours—but every decision impacts your success. The game’s immersive world and nonlinear gameplay make each mission a unique challenge.

## Key Features

### Silent Assassin Gameplay
Execute missions with precision, using disguises, environmental kills, and stealth to avoid detection. The less noise you make, the higher your rating.

### Diverse Mission Locations
Travel from Hong Kong to Colombia, each location offering unique opportunities and challenges for your assassinations.

### Weapon Variety
Choose from an arsenal of firearms, poisons, and melee weapons to eliminate targets in creative ways.

### Nonlinear Objectives
Complete missions your way—whether through brute force, cunning disguises, or perfect timing.

### Challenging AI
Enemies react dynamically to your actions, forcing you to adapt or face escalating consequences.

## Gameplay Overview

*Hitman Codename 47* blends strategy and action, rewarding players who plan their moves carefully. Each mission presents multiple paths to success, encouraging experimentation. Disguises allow you to infiltrate restricted areas, while environmental interactions provide lethal opportunities. The game’s realism and depth make it a standout in the stealth genre, offering a tense, methodical experience for those who thrive in the shadows.

frontmatter.title: Hitman Codename 47
frontmatter.description: Hitman Codename 47 is a stealth action game where you play as a genetically engineered assassin. Navigate intricate levels, eliminate targets with precision, and master the art of disguise in this classic 2000 title.

minimum.processor: Pentium II 450 MHz
minimum.graphics: 16 MB DirectX 8.1 compatible

recommended.processor: Pentium III 700 MHz
recommended.graphics: 32 MB DirectX 8.1 compatible
